attributes.title: Guardian — ARGUS anomaly score over time
attributes.visState: {"title": "Guardian — ARGUS anomaly score over time", "type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "score.anomaly_score", "customLabel": "max anomaly score"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "useNormalizedOpenSearchInterval": true, "scaleMetricValues": false, "interval": "auto", "drop_partials": false, "min_doc_count": 1, "extended_bounds": {}}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "group", "params": {"field": "score.entity_type", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 4, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"type": "line", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "max anomaly score"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "max anomaly score", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "interpolate": "linear", "showCircles": true}], "thresholdLine": {"show": true, "value": 0.5, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.title: Guardian — Alerts over time by severity
attributes.visState: {"title": "Guardian — Alerts over time by severity", "type": "histogram", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "useNormalizedOpenSearchInterval": true, "scaleMetricValues": false, "interval": "auto", "drop_partials": false, "min_doc_count": 1, "extended_bounds": {}}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "group", "params": {"field": "alert.severity", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 3, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"type": "histogram", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "Alerts"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "histogram", "mode": "stacked", "data": {"label": "Count", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": true}], "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.title: Guardian — Alerts by type
attributes.visState: {"title": "Guardian — Alerts by type", "type": "pie", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "alert.type", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 10, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"type": "pie", "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "isDonut": true, "labels": {"show": false, "values": true, "last_level": true, "truncate": 100}}}

attributes.title: Guardian — Alert feed
attributes.visState: {"title": "Guardian — Alert feed", "type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "occurrences"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "customLabel": "latest"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "alert.summary.keyword", "orderBy": "2", "order": "desc", "size": 15, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing", "customLabel": "alert"}}], "params": {"perPage": 10, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "showTotal": false, "totalFunc": "sum", "percentageCol": ""}}
